name: hud_ui_background_cursor_widget_member_constructor_local
description: HudUiBackgroundCursorWidget::MemberConstructorLocal initializes the cursor widget state and optional owned image refresh path.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 104 unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 123 bytes and the VC object body is 96 bytes with 8 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

Reviewed drift is dominated by the retail VC EH registration frame around the base HudUiWidget construction and optional SetImageByPathOwnedAndRefresh call; direct callees HudUiWidget::Constructor and HudUiBackgroundCursorWidget::SetImageByPathOwnedAndRefresh are Binary-safe.

The native smoke covers the null-image constructor path, cursor ftable installation, base widget defaults, capture-enabled argument storage, captured-image and reserved slot clearing, capture source selector initialization, and destructor-core ftable restoration.
